block_00: Learn to set up your technical indicators
block_01: If you have ever used a technical indicator in trading, you must have wondered how to pick the settings for it. The choice of whether to leave the indicator as it is or adjust its settings, depends on the level of your knowledge and experience.
block_02: It is needless to say, that the first and most important point in setting up an indicator is understanding its purpose and the way it works. To learn more about how to adjust indicators’ settings, read this article.
block_03: How to pick the best settings for an indicator? Find out now.
